weekPriority: Drive initial user acquisition and revenue for Paradox Pixel Playground

tasks.task: Launch initial marketing campaign for Paradox Pixel Playground to drive user acquisition.
tasks.reason: Crucial for generating first users and potential revenue for the new game, given $0 total revenue.

tasks.task: Implement and monitor initial monetization mechanics and set up core analytics for Paradox Pixel Playground.
tasks.reason: Ensure the new game can generate revenue and track early performance metrics effectively.

tasks.task: Begin gathering qualitative feedback from early players of Paradox Pixel Playground.
tasks.reason: Inform future content updates and identify early user experience issues for iteration.

recommendation: Prioritize aggressive marketing and direct monetization efforts for Paradox Pixel Playground to establish an initial revenue stream as quickly as possible.
